## Type

- [ ] Component

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] I updated docs or examples when public behavior changed.
- [ ] I kept the dependency-free runtime contract intact.
- [ ] I used per-component exports where possible.
- [ ] I considered keyboard, focus, RTL/LTR, i18n, and reduced-motion behavior.
